function.name: get_case_law
function.description: Look up a specific court opinion or search by keyword. Returns case name, citation, court, year, holding, key reasoning, and current legal status (good_law, overruled, questioned, or superseded).

query.description: Case name, citation (e.g., '410 U.S. 113'), or keyword search.

jurisdiction.description: Jurisdiction filter, e.g., 'federal', 'US Supreme Court', 'CA', 'NY', '9th Circuit'.

lookup_type.description: Direction of lookup. 'by_citation' for known citation; 'by_keyword' for topical search.

function.name: get_statute
function.description: Returns the current text of a federal or state statute. Includes effective date, amendment history, and current status. Use for citations like '18 U.S.C. § 1001' or 'Cal. Civ. Code § 1542'.

citation.description: Statute citation (e.g., '18 U.S.C. § 1001', 'Cal. Civ. Code § 1542', '42 U.S.C. § 1983').

function.name: get_regulation
function.description: Returns the current text of a federal or state regulation (CFR, state administrative code). Includes issuing agency, effective date, and last revision date.

function.name: get_court_rule
function.description: Returns the current text of a court procedural rule (FRCP, FRE, FRCrP, or state equivalents). Includes effective date and last amendment date.

rule_set.description: Which rule set. FRCP=Federal Rules of Civil Procedure; FRE=Federal Rules of Evidence; FRCrP=Federal Rules of Criminal Procedure.

function.name: get_legal_definition
function.description: Returns the legal definition of a term, with source attribution and any jurisdiction-specific notes.

function.name: get_contract_clause
function.description: Returns standard text and common variations for a contract clause type, with jurisdiction-specific drafting notes.

clause_type.description: Type of clause (e.g., 'force majeure', 'indemnification', 'limitation of liability', 'governing law', 'assignment').

function.name: get_legal_precedent
function.description: Returns a list of controlling and persuasive precedents on a legal topic in a given jurisdiction. Each entry includes case name, citation, court, controlling-in jurisdiction, holding summary, and current status.

topic.description: Legal topic or doctrine (e.g., 'qualified immunity', 'Article III standing', 'Chevron deference', 'employment at-will exceptions').

function.name: get_secondary_authority
function.description: Returns a citation and summary from secondary legal sources: treatises (Wright & Miller, Corbin), Restatements, ALR annotations, or law review articles.

function.name: get_court_filing
function.description: Returns the docket / list of filings for a specific case in a specific court. Each entry includes filing type, filed date, party, and brief description.

court.description: Court name (e.g., 'S.D.N.Y.', 'D.D.C.', 'Cal. Super. Ct., Los Angeles County').
